# Vestig

> Zero-dependency TypeScript logging with auto PII sanitization, native tracing, and multi-runtime support.

- [Full documentation](https://vestig.dev/llms-full.txt)

## Getting Started
- [Introduction](https://vestig.dev/docs): Introduction
- [Installation](https://vestig.dev/docs/getting-started): Installation
- [Features Overview](https://vestig.dev/docs/features): Features Overview

## Core Concepts
- [Logging Basics](https://vestig.dev/docs/core/logging): Logging Basics
- [Log Levels](https://vestig.dev/docs/core/levels): Log Levels
- [Structured Output](https://vestig.dev/docs/core/structured): Structured Output
- [Child Loggers](https://vestig.dev/docs/core/child-loggers): Child Loggers
- [Runtime Detection](https://vestig.dev/docs/runtime): Runtime Detection

## Tracing
- [Overview](https://vestig.dev/docs/tracing): Overview
- [Spans](https://vestig.dev/docs/tracing/spans): Spans
- [Context Propagation](https://vestig.dev/docs/tracing/context): Context Propagation
- [W3C Trace Context](https://vestig.dev/docs/tracing/w3c): W3C Trace Context
- [OTLP Export](https://vestig.dev/docs/tracing/otlp): OTLP Export

## Transports
- [Overview](https://vestig.dev/docs/transports): Overview

## Sampling
- [Overview](https://vestig.dev/docs/sampling): Overview
- [Advanced Sampling](https://vestig.dev/docs/sampling/advanced): Advanced Sampling

## Wide Events
- [Overview](https://vestig.dev/docs/wide-events): Overview
- [Tail Sampling](https://vestig.dev/docs/wide-events/tail-sampling): Tail Sampling

## Security
- [PII Sanitization](https://vestig.dev/docs/security/sanitization): PII Sanitization

## Integrations
- [Next.js](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs): Next.js
- [Next.js Middleware](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/middleware): Next.js Middleware
- [Server Components](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/server-components): Server Components
- [Route Handlers](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/route-handlers): Route Handlers
- [Server Actions](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/server-actions): Server Actions
- [Client Components](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/client): Client Components
- [Wide Events](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/wide-events): Wide Events
- [Dev Overlay](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/dev-overlay): Dev Overlay
- [Web Vitals](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/web-vitals): Web Vitals
- [Error Boundary](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/error-boundary): Error Boundary
- [Database Logging](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/database): Database Logging
- [Instrumentation](https://vestig.dev/docs/nextjs/instrumentation): Instrumentation

- [Cloudflare & Edge](https://vestig.dev/docs/deployments/cloudflare): Cloudflare & Edge

- [Error Handling](https://vestig.dev/docs/advanced/error-handling): Error Handling
- [Error Recovery](https://vestig.dev/docs/advanced/error-recovery): Error Recovery
- [Performance Tuning](https://vestig.dev/docs/advanced/performance): Performance Tuning
- [Memory Management](https://vestig.dev/docs/advanced/memory-management): Memory Management
- [Custom Transports](https://vestig.dev/docs/advanced/custom-transports): Custom Transports

- [Migration from Pino](https://vestig.dev/docs/guides/migration-from-pino): Migration from Pino

## API Reference
- [vestig](https://vestig.dev/docs/api): vestig
- [@vestig/next](https://vestig.dev/docs/api/next): @vestig/next
